"Issues")[![GitHub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crystal-nest/mod-fancy-assets/main/github/github.svg "GitHub")](https://github.com/crystal-nest/fancy-entity-renderer/issues) --- ## 📝 **Description** Fancy Entity Renderer is a mod API that allows to easily draw entities in any Screen, Menu, GUI, or HUD! **Officially used by [FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu)**: ## 🔗 **Dependencies** | Mod | Loader | Requirement | Purpose | |:------------------------------------------------------|:------:|:-----------------:|:----------------------------------------| | [Prometheus](https://modrinth.com/mod/prometheus-api) | All | Optional `1.21+` | Customize the color of the fire overlay | | [Soul Fire'd](https://modrinth.com/mod/soul-fire-d) | All | Optional `1.20.1` | Customize the color of the fire overlay | ## 📜 **License and right of use** Feel free to use this mod for any mod, modpack, or video, just be sure to give credit and possibly link [here](https://github.com/crystal-nest/fancy-entity-renderer#readme). This project is published under the [Crystal Nest Community License v1](https://github.com/crystal-nest/fancy-entity-renderer/blob/master/LICENSE). ## ❤️ **Support us** [![Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/d559b544-474c-4109-b861-1b2e6ca6026a.webp "Bisect Hosting")](https://bisecthosting.com/crystalspider)
